title: hymenophyllum rufescens
intro: Hymenophyllum rufescens, also known as the rusty lip fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum rufescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
